hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */locales/*.json|*/data/*.json) err=$(jq empty "$f" 2>&1); [ -n "$err" ] && jq -n --arg f "$f" --arg err "$err" '{systemMessage: ("Invalid JSON in " + $f + ": " + $err), decision: "block", reason: "Fix JSON syntax before proceeding."}' ;; esac; true; }
